creator: agh@riseup.net
text:
(In reply to Robert Clausecker from comment #23)

> Perhaps you could also try to blindly apply Debian's patch and have me try to build again with gnat patched like this.

I can give it a go, tho, that might have to wait until the weekend.

I remembered some similar PRs:
* lang/gnat12: missing ali files for aarch64 (bug #279996)
* lang/gnat12: missing ali files for aarch64 (bug #285387)
